rationale: The 2013 paper cites Van Heerde, Gijbrechts, and Pauwels (2008) in its model-development logic, specifically to justify using prior promotional purchase activity as predictors of current sale incidence and outcomes. It also references the 2008 study when interpreting results, noting similar evidence that prior attendance and purchasing are associated with stronger current promotional response. This is more than a background mention because the cited paper directly informs variable specification and empirical interpretation in the citing paper.
relation_description: The citing paper applies an empirical modeling insight from the cited price-war study by using prior purchase/promotion behavior as explanatory variables in its own promotional-sales response model. It uses the cited paper as precedent for both model setup and interpretation of related effects.
